title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: Best Actress Category
text: Hollywood Reporter's awards expert Scott Feinberg notes that Jessie Buckley is the frontrunner with a sweep of major televised awards. Buckley is described as the heart and soul of Hamnet and has swept the entire circuit of televised awards shows including Critics Choice, Golden Globes, BAFTA and Actor Awards. However, chief film critic David Rooney expresses a contrarian view, finding Buckley's performance somewhat overwrought and advocating for Renate Reinsve's transfixing balance of emotional volatility and sly humor in Sentimental Value. Rooney also praises Rose Byrne's performance in If I Had Legs I'd Kick You as a remarkably sustained feat of navigating maternal instability. The race reflects a divide between industry consensus favoring Buckley and critical preference for Reinsve's nuanced interpretation.
